title: Red Hat Security Advisory: gimp security update
overview:
An update for gimp is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.4 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux AppStream EUS (v.9.4)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: gimp security update

An update for gimp is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.4 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for gimp is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.4 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

CVE-2025-15059: A flaw was found in GIMP. Opening a specially crafted PSP file with GIMP can cause a heap-based buffer overflow due to improper input validation of the length of user-supplied data. An attacker can exploit this vulnerability by convincing a user to open a specially crafted PSP file, resulting in a denial of service or potentially code execution in the context of the current process.
